$comment: IDD in-session enforcement — GitHub Copilot hooks (CLI, cloud coding agent, VS Code agent mode; installed as .github/hooks/idd.json). Envelope follows the field-observed contract: PascalCase event names, command + timeout entry fields, and deny decisions emitted both top-level (CLI) and under hookSpecificOutput (VS Code). PostToolUse runs the committed ast-grep checks on edited files, including paths extracted from V4A apply_patch input records. PreToolUse is the commit gate: mechanical checks plus verification of the judgment attestation against the staged fingerprint. Stop is the completion gate: attestation vs the worktree fingerprint, blocking with 'run /idd-judgment-review' when missing, failed, or stale. Gates are deterministic — they verify evidence, they never invoke an LLM. Hooks never signal by exit code (exit 2 means warn-and-continue in Copilot): they emit stdout JSON and exit 0. Silent no-op when tools are missing or nothing applies.

PostToolUse.command:
p=$(cat); command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; ls .github/idd/checks/*.yml >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; t=$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.toolName // .tool_name // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$t" in edit|create|str_replace_editor|apply_patch|Edit|Write) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; fs=$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.toolArgs.path // .toolArgs.filePath // .toolArgs.file_path // .tool_input.path // .tool_input.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$fs" ]; then fs=$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.toolArgs.input // .tool_input.input // empty' 2>/dev/null | sed -n -e 's/^\*\*\* Add File: //p' -e 's/^\*\*\* Update File: //p'); fi; fs=$(printf '%s
' "$fs" | while IFS= read -r f; do [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && printf '%s
' "$f"; done); [ -n "$fs" ] || exit 0; out=$(printf '%s
' "$fs" | xargs ast-grep scan --config sgconfig.yml 2>&1) || { ctx=$(printf 'IDD mechanical check failed — fix before proposing this diff:
%s
' "$out" | jq -Rs .); printf '{"additionalContext":%s}
' "$ctx"; }; exit 0

PreToolUse.command:
p=$(cat); command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; t=$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.toolName // .tool_name // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$t" in bash|powershell|run_in_terminal|Bash) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; cmd=$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.toolArgs.command // .tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; deny(){ r=$(printf '%s
' "$1" | jq -Rs .); printf '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":%s,"hookSpecificOutput":{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":%s}}
' "$r" "$r"; exit 0; }; if command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 && ls .github/idd/checks/*.yml >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=$(ast-grep scan --config sgconfig.yml 2>&1) || deny "$(printf 'IDD commit gate: mechanical checks failed — fix before committing:
%s' "$out")"; fi; if [ -f .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh ]; then out=$(bash .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh gate staged 2>&1) || deny "$out"; fi; exit 0

Stop.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -f .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh ] || exit 0; out=$(bash .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh gate worktree 2>&1) || { r=$(printf '%s\n' "$out" | jq -Rs .); printf '{"decision":"block","reason":%s}\n' "$r"; }; exit 0
